missions.title: Electronic Devices - Section 1

microtargets.title: Intrinsic semiconductor
mustKnowFacts: Intrinsic semiconductor is a fundamental subtopic of Electronic Devices.

commonTraps: Students often misinterpret Intrinsic semiconductor during complex MCQs.
